messages.body: Hello Ateena,  We initiate the refund from our end
It cleared we are waiting for the refund

The transaction was an ACH transfer and it was still pending at the time. That meant the funds weren’t with you or with us yet - they were sitting with the bank. It looks like the transfer should have gone through by now…
Hello Ateena,  Apologies for the inconvenience caused.   I’m not sure why that happened. Please allow me sometime. I’m checking this with my finance team.
Well it did and I'm not happy right now. Very disappointed in your company ethics.
It's currently pending on my bank account
Can you please speak to your bank about this? I checked with my finance team and they said the payment won’t go through
I’m checking with my finance team regarding this. Please allow me sometime
Hello Ateena,  The Zoca landing page has already been removed from Google
Looks like the link is disabled now so thanks
If this doesn't get cancelled I'm contacting my attorney. Cancel this payment and take down the website. It's not that hard. I'm tired of asking.
Also with respect to the payment, there was an auto debit set up right? We haven’t deducted the payment for November.
At this point this is the second payment of what was explained as a free trial. I am requesting that both payments be refunded or I am taking this up with my bank and my lawyer.
Taken just now showing zoca site

I'm still seeing the zoca site come up on google. This is not good for our business and confusing for clients as we do not use the messenging on zoca and the site does not reflect our current business accurately. Please …
You’re welcome!
You’re welcome!
Hello Ateena,  Hope you’re doing well!  Yes, I’ve already raised the cancellation request to the team and it’ll be done soon :)
It is confusing for our clients and taking traffic away from our main site.
Thank you
I would appreciate it if the knotjustbarbers.zoca.com site can be taken down. Thank you.
Sure, let me get back to you on this!
Hey Ateena How are you

Hello Ateena, Thanks for reaching out :)   I’ll make sure our team is notified right away so there will be no further charges moving forward.  That said, before we close things out completely, I want to be transparent, w…
Not at this moment. Please make sure no further charges will be incurred. It has been a pleasure.

Hello,  Thank you for assisting with the off boarding call. After further Internal review we have agreed that we are not going to continue with this subscription and partnership at this current time. We look forward to t…

Hello Ateena,  It was lovely speaking with you! :)  As discussed over our call, I’ve set up our meeting on 7th November at 12.30 PM. Here’s the link - http://meet.google.com/ryh-sykg-kzr  Looking forward to speaking with…
No one showed up on the call

Hello, please state your name after the tone and Google Voice will try to connect you. Monisha? By five he said, by four he'll say, or you come at two he'll say, I mean. Hi Athena, this is Monisha from Zoka. How are you?…

The meeting is for 12:30 for off boarding.
Yes
Please respond

Hello Ateena,  Hope you’re doing well!  Thank you for letting us know and for giving Zoca a try. I completely understand your decision, though I’d really appreciate the chance to connect for a quick call before we finali…
Did you schedule the off-boarding call through the zoca app?
Alright then
I have the email with the meet link
Please state your name after the tone and Google Voice will try to connect you. The Google Subscriber you have called is not available. Please leave a message after the tone.

After testing the Zoca platform I’ve decided to discontinue the service. I appreciate the effort your team has put into my account and website, the current lead-management system isn’t a good fit for Knot Just Barbers Pl…
